title: Toggl Track Documentation
prompt_source: Inline docs prompt; CONNECTOR_DOCUMENTATION_GUIDELINES fetched via getDocGuidelines()

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
**Toggl Track** is a time-tracking SaaS exposing a REST API v9 under `https://api.track.toggl.com/api/v9`. This connector ŌĆö `TogglConnector` (`CONNECTOR_TYPE = "toggl"`, `AUTH_TYPE = "api_key"`) ŌĆö wraps the operational surfaces a Shielva tenant typically needs from Toggl:

| Surface | Base path | Capability |
|---|---|---|
| Me | `/me` | Authenticated user profile, default workspace |
| Workspaces | `/workspaces` | List + read workspaces |
| Projects | `/workspaces/{wid}/projects` | List, get, create projects |
| Time Entries | `/me/time_entries`, `/workspaces/{wid}/time_entries` | List, current, create, update, stop, delete |
| Tags | `/workspaces/{wid}/tags` | List tags |
| Clients | `/workspaces/{wid}/clients` | List + create clients |
| Tasks | `/workspaces/{wid}/projects/{pid}/tasks` | List project tasks (premium feature) |

The connector normalises projects + time entries into `NormalizedDocument` (id = `f"{tenant_id}_{source_id}"`), surfaces standalone `async def` methods per user-requested operation (OCP), retries 429 / 5xx with exponential backoff (3 attempts), and never embeds raw HTTP in `connector.py` (SOC ŌĆö all HTTP delegated to `client/http_client.py::TogglHTTPClient`).

sections.title: Quick Start
sections.content:
### 1. Generate a Toggl Track API token

1. Sign in to https://track.toggl.com.
2. Open **Profile Settings** (top-right account menu ŌåÆ Profile Settings).
3. Scroll to the **API Token** section.
4. Click **Reveal** and copy the token value (or click **Reset** to mint a fresh one).
5. From the **Workspaces** sidebar, copy the numeric **Workspace ID** of the workspace you want to default to (visible in the URL after `/workspaces/`).

### 2. Install in ACP

In **ACP ŌåÆ Manage Connectors ŌåÆ Toggl Track**, fill in:

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| `api_token` (secret) | Token from step 4 |
| `default_workspace_id` (text, optional) | Numeric default workspace ID ŌĆö methods accept workspace_id override per call |
| `base_url` (text, optional) | Override `https://api.track.toggl.com/api/v9` (rarely needed) |
| `rate_limit_per_min` (number) | Soft cap, default 60 |

Click **Install**. `install()` validates `api_token` is present (it does NOT call the API), initialises the `TogglHTTPClient`, and returns `ConnectorStatus(HEALTHY, AUTHENTICATED)`.

### 3. First health check

The gateway calls `health_check()` which probes `GET /me`. On 2xx ŌåÆ `HEALTHY + CONNECTED`. On 401 ŌåÆ `DEGRADED + TOKEN_EXPIRED`. On 403 ŌåÆ `UNHEALTHY + INVALID_CREDENTIALS`. On 429 ŌåÆ `DEGRADED + CONNECTED` with structured-log warning.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content:
Toggl Track REST API v9 uses **HTTP Basic authentication with a Toggl-specific quirk** (`AUTH_TYPE = "api_key"`).

### The "api_token" password quirk

The `api_token` is sent as the **username** in HTTP Basic auth, and the **literal string `"api_token"`** is sent as the **password**:

```
Authorization: Basic base64("<api_token>:api_token")
```

This is NOT a bearer token. If you send `Authorization: Bearer <token>` Toggl returns 403. The `httpx` client used here passes `auth=(api_token, "api_token")` which produces the correct header automatically.

### Credential model

- `api_token` ŌĆö Toggl Track personal API token from **Profile Settings ŌåÆ API Token**.
- No OAuth, no refresh token, no expiry.

### Lifecycle

| Phase | Behaviour |
|---|---|
| `install()` | Validates `api_token`. Initialises `TogglHTTPClient`. Does **not** call any Toggl endpoint. |
| `authorize(...)` | Returns a TokenInfo wrapping the api_token ŌĆö there is no token exchange. |
| `health_check()` | `GET /me` ŌĆö lightest authenticated probe. |
| `ensure_token()` | Not called ŌĆö no token to refresh. |
| token storage | None. |

### Header contract

Every outbound request:

```
Authorization: Basic base64("<api_token>:api_token")    ŌåÉ Toggl quirk
Content-Type:  application/json
Accept:        application/json
```

sections.title: Configuration
sections.content:
### Install fields (per-tenant)

Read via `self.config.get(...)` in `connector.py::__init__` ŌĆö never hardcoded.

| Key | Type | Required | Read in code | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `api_token` | secret | yes | `self.api_token` | Basic-auth username; "api_token" literal is the password |
| `default_workspace_id` | text | no | `self.default_workspace_id` | Per-call default workspace |
| `base_url` | text | no | `self.base_url` (defaults to `https://api.track.toggl.com/api/v9`) | Override for Toggl sandbox or proxy |
| `rate_limit_per_min` | number | no | `self.rate_limit_per_min` (default 60) | Client-side soft cap |

### Class constants (provider-wide)

```python
REQUIRED_CONFIG_KEYS = ["api_token"]
_STATUS_MAP = {
    401: ("OFFLINE",   "TOKEN_EXPIRED"),
    403: ("UNHEALTHY", "INVALID_CREDENTIALS"),
    429: ("DEGRADED",  "CONNECTED"),
}
_TOGGL_BASE = "https://api.track.toggl.com/api/v9"
```

sections.title: API Methods
sections.content: All public async methods on `TogglConnector`. SOC: connector.py orchestrates only; HTTP lives in `client/http_client.py::TogglHTTPClient`.

children.title: Lifecycle
children.content:
### `async install() -> ConnectorStatus`
Validate `api_token`; initialise `TogglHTTPClient`. Does NOT call the API.

### `async authorize(auth_code, state) -> TokenInfo`
No-op for api_key auth ŌĆö returns a TokenInfo wrapping the configured api_token.

### `async health_check() -> ConnectorStatus`
Calls `GET /me`. Classifies failures by `_STATUS_MAP`.

### `async sync(since=None, full=False, kb_id=None, webhook_url=None) -> SyncResult`
Iterates Toggl projects per workspace + time entries from `/me/time_entries` ŌåÆ `NormalizedDocument` ŌåÆ `ingest_document`. Returns `SyncResult` with `documents_synced / _failed / _found`.

children.title: Me + Workspaces
children.content:
### `async get_me() -> Dict`
`GET /me`.

### `async list_workspaces() -> List`
`GET /workspaces`.

### `async get_workspace(workspace_id) -> Dict`
`GET /workspaces/{wid}`.

children.title: Projects
children.content:
### `async list_projects(workspace_id, active=None, page=None, per_page=None) -> List`
`GET /workspaces/{wid}/projects?active=&page=&per_page=`.

### `async get_project(workspace_id, project_id) -> Dict`
`GET /workspaces/{wid}/projects/{pid}`.

### `async create_project(workspace_id, project) -> Dict`
`POST /workspaces/{wid}/projects` ŌĆö body is the project JSON directly (no envelope).

children.title: Time Entries
children.content:
### `async list_time_entries(start_date=None, end_date=None, since=None) -> List`
`GET /me/time_entries?start_date=&end_date=&since=`. Dates are RFC 3339 / ISO 8601.

### `async get_current_time_entry() -> Dict`
`GET /me/time_entries/current` ŌĆö returns the currently-running entry or null.

### `async create_time_entry(workspace_id, entry) -> Dict`
`POST /workspaces/{wid}/time_entries`. Use `duration: -1` and `start` set to now to start a running entry.

### `async update_time_entry(workspace_id, time_entry_id, entry) -> Dict`
`PUT /workspaces/{wid}/time_entries/{teid}`.

### `async stop_time_entry(workspace_id, time_entry_id) -> Dict`
`PATCH /workspaces/{wid}/time_entries/{teid}/stop` ŌĆö stops a running entry, sets `stop` to now.

### `async delete_time_entry(workspace_id, time_entry_id) -> Dict`
`DELETE /workspaces/{wid}/time_entries/{teid}`.

children.title: Tags ┬Ę Clients ┬Ę Tasks
children.content:
### `async list_tags(workspace_id) -> List`
`GET /workspaces/{wid}/tags`.

### `async list_clients(workspace_id) -> List`
`GET /workspaces/{wid}/clients`.

### `async create_client(workspace_id, client) -> Dict`
`POST /workspaces/{wid}/clients`.

### `async list_tasks(workspace_id, project_id) -> List`
`GET /workspaces/{wid}/projects/{pid}/tasks` ŌĆö premium feature; 402 surfaces as `TogglError`.

sections.title: Error Handling
sections.content:
Exception hierarchy in `exceptions.py`:

```
TogglError                              # base; carries status_code + response_body
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ TogglAuthError                      # 401 / 403
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ TogglBadRequestError                # 400
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ TogglNotFoundError                  # 404
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ TogglConflictError                  # 409
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ TogglRateLimitError                 # 429 ŌĆö retry_after_s
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ TogglServerError                    # 5xx
```

Back-compat aliases preserved:
```
TogglNetworkError = TogglServerError    # legacy name from older code
TogglNotFound     = TogglNotFoundError
```

### Retry behaviour (`client/http_client.py::_request`)

| Status | Action |
|---|---|
| 400 / 401 / 403 / 404 | Raise immediately |
| 429 | Exponential backoff `_BACKOFF_BASE * 2 ** attempt` (0.5s, 1s, 2s), retry up to `_MAX_RETRIES=3` |
| 5xx | Same exponential backoff, retry up to 3 |
| `httpx.TimeoutException` / `httpx.NetworkError` | Backoff, retry up to 3, then raise `TogglNetworkError` |

### How errors surface to the gateway

`health_check()` catches exceptions and maps via `_STATUS_MAP`:

```
401 ŌåÆ ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED,  TOKEN_EXPIRED)
403 ŌåÆ ConnectorStatus(UNHEALTHY, INVALID_CREDENTIALS)
429 ŌåÆ ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED,  CONNECTED)    ŌĆö logged as warning
other ŌåÆ ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED, CONNECTED)
```

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.content:
| Symptom | Probable cause | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, MISSING_CREDENTIALS)` at install | `api_token` blank | Re-enter the token. Toggl shows the token in Profile Settings indefinitely ŌĆö copy then paste into ACP. |
| `ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED, TOKEN_EXPIRED)` at health_check | 401 ŌĆö token invalid or revoked | Reset the token in Toggl Profile Settings and update the install field. |
| `ConnectorStatus(UNHEALTHY, INVALID_CREDENTIALS)` at health_check | 403 ŌĆö wrong password literal (someone replaced "api_token" with the actual token) | Verify the HTTP client uses `httpx.BasicAuth(api_token, "api_token")` ŌĆö the literal string "api_token" MUST be the password. |
| `toggl.http.retry` warnings spike | Hitting 429 (Toggl ~1 req/sec per IP) | The client retries with exponential backoff. Lower `rate_limit_per_min` or batch fewer requests. |
| 404 on a workspace-scoped call | Wrong `workspace_id`, or workspace not visible to this token | Confirm `workspace_id` is numeric and visible via `list_workspaces()`. The token only sees workspaces its user belongs to. |
| 402 Payment Required on `list_tasks` | Tasks are a Toggl Track premium feature | Upgrade the Toggl workspace to a premium plan, or stop calling `list_tasks` for free-tier workspaces. |
| `ImportError: cannot import name 'TogglNetworkError'` | Older exceptions.py without back-compat aliases | Already fixed ŌĆö `TogglNetworkError = TogglServerError` alias added in `exceptions.py`. |
| Time entry created but `start_date` filter returns nothing | Filter expects `YYYY-MM-DD` or RFC 3339; `2026-06-21T10:00` (no Z) sometimes fails | Always pass dates with timezone designator (`Z` or `+00:00`). |
